title: Pre-season testing specialist or domain gate
summary: Race includes Pre-Season Testing, which is not a Grand Prix strategy environment.
rationale: Race includes Pre-Season Testing, which is not a Grand Prix strategy environment. F1 describes testing as data collection, reliability work, sandbagging, and pit-stop practice; FastF1 also treats testing events separately from race weekends. A single race-strategy model may mis-rank these rows.
implementation_hint: Add IsTestingRace, TestingYear, and interactions with Compound, TyreLife, LapNumber, PitStop, and Driver frequency. Train either a separate specialist for Race == PRE-SEASON TESTING or use sample-weight/domain-gated blending so race-rule features are downweighted there.
expected_effect: Can improve rows from the testing domain without disturbing Grand Prix rows, especially if public test contains a meaningful testing share.
risk: If testing rows are rare, a specialist may overfit. Keep the gate simple and compare OOF AUC by Race domain.
